summary: SAP connector throughput — sustain 5k records/min for full sync
description_md:
The SAP S/4 connector must maintain high-throughput performance during full synchronization operations to meet enterprise customer expectations for large-scale data migrations.

**Performance Constraints**:

* **Throughput**: Sustain minimum 5,000 records per minute for continuous 60-minute duration without degradation
* **Latency**: End-to-end record processing latency under 200ms per record (p95) during peak throughput
* **Availability**: 99.9% uptime during sync window with automatic retry on transient failures (max 3 retries)
* **Scalability**: Support horizontal scaling to handle up to 10 concurrent tenant workspaces without cross-tenant interference
* **Reliability**: Zero data loss; all processed records must be accounted for in audit log with reconciliation checksums
